creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 149017
Update to powerdns-3.4.1

Update to PowerDNS 3.4.1
- This is a bugfix release
Changelog: http://doc.powerdns.com/html/changelog.html#changelog-auth-3.4.1

While here, cleanup the Makefile and remove unnecessary patches.

A quick question as well. Since 3.4.0 a mandatory database schema is necessary for several backends. One of the users requested mention of that in UPDATING, but I put it in pkg-message, since that's the location I usually see that sort of things in.

I'd like an extra opinion on that and if UPDATING is where it should be I'd like to know how I'd go about adding to it.

Thanks in advance.
